ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_standards" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size standard */,
  "standard_size" TEXT /* Standard size label (e.g., None, XS, S, M, L) */,
  "it_size" INTEGER /* Equivalent size in IT region */,
  "us_size" INTEGER /* Equivalent size in US region */,
  "uk_size" INTEGER /* Equivalent size in UK region */,
  "fr_size" INTEGER /* Equivalent size in FR region */,
  "size_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size type */,
  "measurement_chart" TEXT /* Detailed measurement chart for the size */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size standard was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the size standard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_standards_size_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_type_id") REFERENCES size_types ("size_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., United States, United Kingdom) */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Code for the region (e.g., US, UK, FR, IT) */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code used in the region */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_types" (
  "size_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size type */,
  "size_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the size type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the size type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the size type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "size_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size type */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size standard */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_size_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_type_id") REFERENCES size_types ("size_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_standards ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventories" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity in stock */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the inventory record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventories_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method used (e.g., standard, express) */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was placed */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer's region */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the customer account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, customer support) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
